basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar IT Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 IT Associate-I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website. The last date to submit the application form is 31-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./MCA or equivalent in Computer Science/IT/Electronics, BCA/B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A. with 4 years experience, Minimum 60% from Graduation and 55% in 10th/12th
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./MCA or equivalent qualification in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics or an appropriate discipline. OR BCA/B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post-qualification experience. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in Class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar IT Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Gandhinagar IT Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./MCA or equivalent qualification in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics or an appropriate discipline. OR BCA/B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post-qualification experience. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in Class 10th and 12th.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar IT Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar IT Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IT Associate-I post at IIT Gandhinagar is July 31, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the IT Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./MCA or equivalent in Computer Science/IT/Electronics, or a BCA/B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A. with 4 years of experience. Minimum 60% from graduation and 55% in 10th/12th are also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the IT Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the IT Associate-I position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the IT Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The salary for the IT Associate-I position ranges from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the IT Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the IT Associate-I post at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar IT Associate-I recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IT Associate-I post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the IT Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The IT Associate-I position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
